title: センチメートルのセンチメンタル

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Is that a tiger-print shirt I'm seein'?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: It's kinda funny... Ladies in tiger prints were everywhere in Kansai, but I haven't seen one here in a bit, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think of it, I dunno when's the last time
I saw a takoyaki stand... And no one here's really
into comedy. Man, I miss home...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Agh, what am I gettin' all instrumental for?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wait, I mean sentimental! Y'know, 'cause I left the band back home! Nyahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Man. My jokes aren't hittin'. I've been away
from Kansai too long.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling disheartened, Tamamo Cross ends up
underperforming in our training session.
